akshita-shoanak.name: Akshita Shoanak Studio Salon
akshita-shoanak.fullAddress: Shop 12, Ground Floor, Saraswati Complex, Sector 19, Ulwe, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 410206
akshita-shoanak.description: Akshita Shoanak Studio Salon is a premium unisex salon nestled in the heart of Ulwe, Navi Mumbai. Founded with a vision to bring international-standard beauty services to the neighbourhood, we combine expertise with warmth. Our team of certified professionals uses only top-tier products to deliver results that exceed expectations — whether it's a quick trim or a complete bridal transformation.
akshita-shoanak.aiReviewSummary: Customers rave about the luxurious ambience, attentive staff, and consistently excellent service quality. The salon is praised for its hygiene standards and the personalised attention each client receives. Bridal packages and keratin treatments are frequently highlighted as standout offerings.

galleryImages.caption: Our luxurious salon interiors designed for comfort
We use only premium natural products
Dedicated nail art and care station

highlights: Award-winning bridal makeup artist on team
Only salon in Ulwe with autoclave sterilization
Complimentary hair spa with every color service
Private bridal suite for wedding prep
Organic and cruelty-free product options available

akreations.name: Akreations Salon & Academy
akreations.tagline: Art meets precision in every cut
akreations.fullAddress: 2nd Floor, Crystal Plaza, Linking Road, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050
akreations.description: Akreations is where artistry meets technical precision. As both a salon and academy, we bring cutting-edge techniques to every service. Our stylists are trained by international experts and continually updated on global trends. From runway-ready looks to everyday elegance, Akreations delivers with flair.
akreations.aiReviewSummary: Reviewers love the creative energy and expertise of the stylists. The academy-trained team delivers consistently trendy and precise results. Hair color transformations and avant-garde cuts receive the most praise.
highlights: Pioneers of creative color in Mumbai

hair-masters.name: Hair Masters Studio
hair-masters.fullAddress: 101, Oshiwara Link Road, Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400053
hair-masters.description: Hair Masters Studio is a dedicated hair-focused salon known for exceptional color work and transformative treatments. Our colour specialists undergo annual training in London and Paris to bring the latest global trends to Mumbai.
hair-masters.aiReviewSummary: Customers highlight the exceptional color work and transformative hair treatments. The team's expertise in balayage and creative coloring is frequently praised. Wait times can be slightly long on weekends.

the-salon-co.name: The Salon Co.
the-salon-co.fullAddress: Unit 5, Trade Tower, Kamala Mills Compound, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013
the-salon-co.description: The Salon Co. blends contemporary aesthetics with timeless beauty techniques. Located in the vibrant Lower Parel business district, we cater to professionals seeking quick yet quality beauty services during their busy schedules.
the-salon-co.aiReviewSummary: Clients appreciate the convenient location and efficient service. Quick turnaround times and professional results make it a favourite for working professionals. The nail art and express facials are top sellers.
highlights: Walk-in friendly with minimal wait times
Curated nail art collections updated monthly

dessange-paris.name: Dessange Paris
dessange-paris.tagline: Parisian luxury in the heart of Mumbai
dessange-paris.fullAddress: Sea Princess Hotel, Juhu Beach, Juhu, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400049
dessange-paris.description: Dessange Paris brings the elegance of French haute coiffure to Mumbai. As part of the renowned international chain, we offer luxurious hair care, spa treatments, and colour services using exclusive Dessange Paris products developed in our French laboratories.
dessange-paris.aiReviewSummary: Clients love the premium French experience and the exclusive products. The spa treatments and colour services are considered best-in-class. High price point is offset by exceptional quality and ambience.
highlights: International luxury brand with presence in 45 countries
VIP private suites for celebrities and weddings

enrich-salon.name: Enrich Salon
enrich-salon.fullAddress: Shop 7-8, Hiranandani Gardens, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400076
enrich-salon.description: Enrich is one of India's leading salon chains, known for making quality beauty services accessible to everyone. Our Powai outlet offers the full range of hair, skin, and nail services with trained professionals and standardised quality.
enrich-salon.aiReviewSummary: Reliable and consistent quality at affordable prices. Customers appreciate the trained staff and wide range of services. Great for regular maintenance and everyday beauty needs.
highlights: Part of India's trusted salon chain

looks-salon.name: Looks Salon
looks-salon.fullAddress: Shop 22, Inorbit Mall, Vashi, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 400703
looks-salon.description: Looks Salon is your go-to destination for trendy haircuts, party makeup, and relaxing spa services. Located inside Inorbit Mall Vashi, we offer convenience, quality, and the latest beauty trends under one roof.
looks-salon.aiReviewSummary: Customers love the mall-adjacent convenience and trendy services. The party makeup and haircut services get top marks. Slightly busy on weekends but worth the wait.

jean-claude-biguine.name: Jean-Claude Biguine
jean-claude-biguine.fullAddress: Ground Floor, Khar Gymkhana Road, Khar West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400052
jean-claude-biguine.description: Jean-Claude Biguine is a French luxury salon brand with a strong Indian presence. We combine time-honoured French beauty traditions with modern Indian aesthetics. Our products are formulated in France and our stylists undergo rigorous training programmes.
jean-claude-biguine.aiReviewSummary: Clients love the French finesse and attention to detail. The hair treatments and spa rituals receive glowing reviews. Premium pricing is justified by the exceptional experience and results.
highlights: French luxury brand with global presence

bounce-salon.name: Bounce Salon & Spa
bounce-salon.fullAddress: Sector 12, Plot 45, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 410210
bounce-salon.description: Bounce Salon & Spa is a fresh, energetic salon in Kharghar offering affordable hair, nail, and waxing services. We believe great beauty services shouldn't break the bank. Perfect for students and young professionals.
bounce-salon.aiReviewSummary: Affordable pricing and friendly staff are the top positives. Good for basic services and maintenance. Young and vibrant atmosphere appeals to the college crowd.

toni-and-guy.name: Toni & Guy
toni-and-guy.fullAddress: Phoenix Mills, Senapati Bapat Marg, Lower Parel, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400013
toni-and-guy.description: Toni & Guy is a world-renowned hairdressing brand born in London. Our Mumbai salon brings British precision and creativity to every service. Known for cutting-edge haircuts, bold colour work, and editorial-quality styling.
toni-and-guy.aiReviewSummary: Consistently praised for precision haircuts and professional service. The brand's reputation for quality holds true at this outlet. Good value for premium international brand services.

bliss-beauty-lounge.name: Bliss Beauty Lounge
bliss-beauty-lounge.tagline: Pure bliss for skin and soul
bliss-beauty-lounge.fullAddress: Shop 5, City Centre Mall, Old Panvel, Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra 410206
bliss-beauty-lounge.description: Bliss Beauty Lounge focuses on skin care, spa services, and body treatments. We offer a peaceful retreat from the everyday hustle with our calming ambience and skilled therapists. Perfect for those seeking relaxation and rejuvenation.
bliss-beauty-lounge.aiReviewSummary: Customers appreciate the relaxing atmosphere and skilled therapists. Spa treatments and body massages are the top-rated services. Affordable spa experience in Panvel area.

naturals-salon.name: Naturals Unisex Salon
naturals-salon.fullAddress: Shop 15, Viviana Mall, Eastern Express Highway, Thane West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400601
naturals-salon.description: Naturals is India's largest unisex salon chain, committed to providing quality services at accessible prices. Our Thane outlet offers the complete range of beauty and grooming services with a focus on natural ingredients and eco-conscious practices.
naturals-salon.aiReviewSummary: One of the most trusted salon chains in India. Customers love the consistent quality and wide accessibility. Bridal services and hair treatments are popular. Can get crowded on weekends.
